Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean
Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.html5
HTML5 Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
Juneau @Marshalled beans for RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs (media type application/problem+json).
org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger
Swagger Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.http
Lightweight HTTP header value types and parsing utilities.
org.apache.juneau.examples.core.pojo
POJO Marshalling Examples
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity
HTTP Entity Beans
org.apache.juneau.http.classic.resource
HTTP Resource Beans
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal
Internal Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats
Method exec stats utilities
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean
    Class
    Description
    BeanType
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control bean introspection and modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
    Class
    Description
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.html5
    Class
    Description
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
    Class
    Description
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
    PropertyValidator
    Validates a bean-property value against a schema.
    PropertyValidatorFactory
    Builds PropertyValidator instances from a JSON-Schema-shaped map of constraints.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3
    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807
    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger
    Class
    Description
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
    Class
    Description
    BeanConfigContext
    Immutable runtime configuration for the bean-modeling layer.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    Builder for BeanConfigContext.
    BeanCtor
    Maps constructor arguments to property names on beans with read-only properties.
    BeanCtorAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanFilter
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the per-class filter surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalent) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side MarshalledFilter.
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanIgnoreAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanInfo
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalents, BeanPropertyMeta-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side ClassMeta.
    BeanInterceptor
    Bean interceptor.
    BeanMap
    Java bean wrapper class.
    BeanMapEntry
    Represents a single entry in a bean map.
    BeanMeta
    Encapsulates all access to the properties of a bean class (like a souped-up BeanInfo).
    BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue
    Represents the result of creating a BeanMeta, including the bean metadata and any reason why it's not a bean.
    BeanMetaInitializer
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes marshalling-aware BeanMeta construction hooks.
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
    BeanPropAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanPropertyConsumer
    Represents a consumer of a single bean property value.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    Contains metadata about a bean property.
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
    BeanPropertyMeta builder class.
    BeanPropertyPostProcessor
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that applies marshalling-side post-processing to a BeanPropertyMeta.Builder after BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#validate() succeeds.
    BeanPropertyValue
    Represents a simple bean property value and the meta-data associated with it.
    BeanRegistryLookup
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the dictionary-lookup surface the bean-runtime types need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side BeanRegistry.
    BeanSession
    Minimum runtime surface that the bean-modeling layer needs from a marshalling session.
    BeanType
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control bean introspection and modeling.
    BeanTypeAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanTypeResolver
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.
    Delegate
    An object that represents another object, often wrapping that object.
    PropertyNamer
    Defines an API for converting conventional bean property names to some other form.
    PropertyValidator
    Validates a bean-property value against a schema.
    PropertyValidatorFactory
    Builds PropertyValidator instances from a JSON-Schema-shaped map of constraints.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.commons.http
    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.examples.core.pojo
    Class
    Description
    BeanCtor
    Maps constructor arguments to property names on beans with read-only properties.
    Name
    Specifies the parameter name for bean property mapping.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity
    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.

    Class
    Description
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean used by org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Class
    Description
    BeanConfig
    Annotation for specifying bean-modeling config properties on REST classes and methods.
    BeanConfigContext
    Immutable runtime configuration for the bean-modeling layer.
    BeanCtor
    Maps constructor arguments to property names on beans with read-only properties.
    BeanFilter
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the per-class filter surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalent) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side MarshalledFilter.
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanInfo
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalents, BeanPropertyMeta-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side ClassMeta.
    BeanInterceptor
    Bean interceptor.
    BeanMap
    Java bean wrapper class.
    BeanMeta
    Encapsulates all access to the properties of a bean class (like a souped-up BeanInfo).
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    Contains metadata about a bean property.
    BeanRegistryLookup
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the dictionary-lookup surface the bean-runtime types need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side BeanRegistry.
    BeanSession
    Minimum runtime surface that the bean-modeling layer needs from a marshalling session.
    BeanType
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control bean introspection and modeling.
    BeanTypeResolver
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.
    Name
    Specifies the parameter name for bean property mapping.
    PropertyNamer
    Defines an API for converting conventional bean property names to some other form.
